name: nanobanana
description: Generate, edit, and analyze images using Nano Banana 2 (gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview)

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API Key
gemini_api_key.description: Your Google AI Studio API key for Nano Banana 2

output_directory.title: Output Directory
output_directory.description: Where generated and edited images are saved

gemini_model.title: Gemini Model
gemini_model.description: Gemini model ID for image generation. Change when Google promotes the model from preview to GA.

strip_metadata.title: Strip Image Metadata
strip_metadata.description: Strip EXIF/IPTC metadata (GPS, device info, timestamps) from JPEG images before sending to the Gemini API. Only applies to JPEG — PNG, WebP, and HEIC metadata is not stripped.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Queue image generation from a text prompt. Returns immediately with a job_id — use check_generation to poll for completion (typically 10-90s)

tools.name: edit_image
tools.description: Queue image editing with a text instruction. Returns immediately with a job_id — use check_generation to poll for completion (typically 10-90s)

tools.name: check_generation
tools.description: Poll the status of an async image generation or edit job for completion, elapsed time, and output file details

tools.name: extract_visual_dna
tools.description: Extract visual DNA from image(s) as structured JSON (style, scene, subject, camera, lighting, materials, colors)

tools.name: describe_image
tools.description: Generate a detailed text description of image(s)

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List available pre-built Visual DNA style templates

tools.name: get_template
tools.description: Get the JSON contents of a Visual DNA style template
